title: Pull Template from API
excerpt: Is It passible to pull items and groups from the template that are created in monday?

posts.author: AditeeR (Aditee Raipurkar)
posts.cookedHtml: Is It passible to pull items and groups from the template that are created in monday?

posts.author: doutomation (Do Anh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear AditeerR,

Yes its possible to do that. I did it last week for my client. Basically when he select the “template name” in a dropdow column, it will create all the subitems exactly like the template. You need to use the graph API to build that query. If you need more help you can drop me a message to info@doutomation.com.

I recently make this private app, maybe it can help you in someway: https://www.doutomation.com/monday-zapier-integration
